description: 科学期刊派。每像素都承载信息。高信息密度+设计优雅。
base_style_prompt: Data-first design. Charts and data 50%, text 30%, whitespace 20%. Large numbers (60pt+) as visual anchors. Annotation systems embedded in layout. Small multiples chart arrays. Precise footnotes and source citations. Scientific rigor meets design elegance.
path_note: Path A exclusive (HTML→PPTX). Complex data visualization requires precise layout control.
philosophy: 每一个像素都必须承载信息。科学严谨+设计优雅。
